org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.util

Class OctoQuadFWv3.LocalizerDataBlock

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.util.OctoQuadFWv3.LocalizerDataBlock
  • Enclosing class:
    OctoQuadFWv3

    public static class OctoQuadFWv3.LocalizerDataBlock
extends java.lang.Object
    A data block holding all localizer data with CRC validation.
